name: Nordic Organic Expo 2026
description: Brings together organic and natural companies from the Nordic region as a marketplace for showcasing new products and trends.
relevance_note: Promotes organic and regenerative food systems relevant to sustainable agriculture and planetary health.

name: International Conference on Environmental Sustainability and Climate Change
description: Gathers researchers, policymakers, industry leaders, and sustainability advocates to explore renewable energy, sustainable resource management, climate resilience, and green technologies.
relevance_note: Multi-stakeholder conference addressing environmental sustainability and climate solutions relevant to planetary governance.

name: Devcon 8
description: Ethereum Foundation's flagship conference at JIO World Center, Mumbai. Focus on decentralized governance, DAOs, and coordination tools.
relevance_note: Central gathering for blockchain governance tooling. Relevant for Spaceship Earth actors working on DAOs and digital democracy.

name: Building Green CPH 2026
description: Nordic region's largest event focused on sustainability in the built environment, bringing together stakeholders to explore climate-conscious building, renovation, and resource reuse.
relevance_note: Focuses on sustainable and regenerative building practices, resource circulation, and scaling solutions for planetary health.

name: Global Forum on Modern Direct Democracy 2026
series: Global Forum on Modern Direct Democracy
description: Brings together democracy practitioners, civil society leaders, researchers, and policymakers to explore the future of modern direct democracy.
relevance_note: Direct democracy mechanisms essential for participatory planetary governance and citizen empowerment in decision-making.

name: OIDP Conference 2026
description: 25th International Observatory on Participatory Democracy conference. Experts in participation and political leaders advocating more participative local democracy.
relevance_note: Leading global conference on participatory democracy. Directly relevant to General Assembly orientation.

name: Sweden Water Expo 2026
description: Trade fair and meeting place for the water and wastewater industry addressing sustainable water infrastructure needs.
relevance_note: Addresses sustainable water infrastructure critical to planetary regeneration and resource management.

name: Future Energy Solutions
description: Focuses on innovations in the energy sector, including digital energy systems and energy transition technologies.
relevance_note: Addresses energy innovation and digital systems for sustainable energy transition relevant to planetary regeneration.

name: World Water Week
description: Convenes global stakeholders to address water-related challenges covering food security, health, agriculture, technology, biodiversity, and climate impacts.
relevance_note: Global multi-stakeholder collaboration on water governance and sustainability critical to planetary health.

name: ConQuest of Mythodea 2026
description: Europe's largest LARP event with ~8000 participants. Faction-based political simulation with governance structures, diplomacy, and conflict resolution.
relevance_note: Largest live governance simulation in Europe. Relevant as example of large-scale participatory game design.

name: World Social Forum 2026
description: Global civil society convergence. Theme: "Resource governance, economic, socio-cultural, political, security, climate, migration, food and health crises? Alternatives for peace, social cohesion, and sustainable development."
relevance_note: Major venue for global governance alternatives, social movements, and commons-based organizing. Relevant across all orientations.

name: 7th World Conference on Climate Change and Global Warming
series: World Conference on Climate Change and Global Warming
description: Brings together researchers, scientists, students, and representatives from academia, government, and industry to address pressing issues in climate change and global warming.
relevance_note: Multi-stakeholder conference addressing climate science, policy, and mitigation strategies relevant to planetary governance.

name: Dweb Camp
description: Decentralized web camp in an ancient forest an hour southwest of Berlin. First DWeb Camp held in Europe. Focus on decentralized technology, governance, and community.
relevance_note: Key gathering for decentralized governance tooling. Metagov community participates. Relevant to Spaceship Earth orientation.

name: 26th Futures Conference
description: Focuses on sustainability, temporalities, and future, fostering interdisciplinary discussions on long-term societal, environmental, and technological challenges.
relevance_note: Futures thinking and long-term perspectives on sustainability transformations relevant to planetary governance and systemic change.

name: NESS Conference 2026
description: 17th Nordic Environmental Social Science conference hosted by Uppsala University. Interdisciplinary knowledge co-production and co-creation for sustainability.
relevance_note: Key Nordic academic venue for environmental governance research. Swedish, directly relevant to Garden orientation.

name: Future Days Festival 2026
description: Co-creative space where changemakers, creatives, and professionals imagine futures. Theme: "Currents of Tomorrow" — exploring streams shaping design, society, and governance. Includes Facilitating Futures Experiences program with Kaospilot.
relevance_note: Nordic futures/experience design festival. Bridge between Eleusinian Mysteries (transformative experience) and General Assembly (governance futures). Kaospilot collaboration.

name: CO2 Capture, Storage & Reuse 2026
description: Focuses on carbon capture, decarbonisation technologies, and CO2 utilisation, bringing together industry leaders, regulators, researchers, and technology providers.
relevance_note: Addresses critical climate technology for planetary regeneration and brings together diverse stakeholders for collaborative solutions.

name: Energimässan 2026
description: Sweden's largest energy expo and conference bringing together professionals to explore low-carbon and energy-efficient technologies and solutions for cities and industry.
relevance_note: Addresses energy transition and low-carbon technologies critical to planetary regeneration.

name: Swedish Climate Symposium 2026
description: Brings together researchers, policymakers, and stakeholders to explore climate change science, societal impacts, and actionable solutions structured around Science, Society, and Action pillars.
relevance_note: Multi-stakeholder dialogue on climate science, societal impacts, and action relevant to planetary governance and transformative change.

name: Could Rights of Nature save Britain's disappearing wildlife?
description: A seminar exploring how Rights of Nature frameworks could help protect Britain's declining wildlife populations, hosted at the Royal Society of Chemistry in London.
relevance_note: Directly addresses planetary governance through Rights of Nature legal frameworks and ecological protection systems relevant to biodiversity conservation and environmental law.

name: MatchPoints Conference 2026
description: Convenes researchers, business representatives, policymakers, public sector officials, practitioners, investors, journalists, and citizens to discuss sustainable development and societal impact.
relevance_note: Brings together diverse stakeholders including citizens and policymakers to discuss sustainable development, relevant to participatory approaches and planetary governance.

name: Gothenburg Sustainability Summit 2026
description: A full-day conference for sustainability professionals and change-makers focusing on leadership and practical solutions for accelerating progress toward global sustainability goals.
relevance_note: Focuses on transformative leadership and practical solutions for global sustainability goals.

name: Skoll World Forum 2026
description: Premier gathering of social entrepreneurs, innovators, and leaders convening to accelerate solutions to the world's most pressing problems.
relevance_note: High-level social entrepreneurship forum. Many tracked actors participate. Funding and partnership opportunities.

name: Indigenous Cosmologies Guiding the Rights of Nature in Practice – Indigenous Council Meeting @ UNPFII
description: Indigenous Council meeting at the UN Permanent Forum on Indigenous Issues exploring how indigenous cosmologies inform Rights of Nature implementation.
relevance_note: Connects indigenous governance systems with international Rights of Nature frameworks, integrating traditional ecological knowledge into planetary governance approaches at the UN level.

name: Knutpunkt 2026
description: Annual Nordic LARP conference rotating between Nordic countries. 2026 theme: "Seasons of larp". Held at Quality Hotel and Eriksbergshallen, Gothenburg.
relevance_note: Core event for the Nordic LARP community. Directly relevant to Eleusinian Mysteries orientation — transformative games, experience design, LARP as governance tool. In Sweden.

name: Edu-Larp Conference 2026
description: Conference on educational LARP held at Lindholmen Science Park, Gothenburg, the day before Knutpunkt 2026.
relevance_note: Bridge between LARP/games and education/governance simulation. Nordic-based.

name: Sustainable Nordic
description: Explores how businesses can integrate sustainability into strategy to drive growth, resilience, and innovation, addressing regulatory frameworks, circularity, and corporate culture transformation.
relevance_note: Focuses on systemic business transformation toward sustainability and circularity, relevant to regenerative economic systems.

name: A World Devouring Machine: A Movie on Mining, Resistance and the Rights of Nature Tribunal's visit to Carajás
description: Film screening and event documenting mining resistance and the Rights of Nature Tribunal's visit to Carajás mining region in Brazil.
relevance_note: Documents grassroots resistance to extractivism and the application of Rights of Nature tribunals as alternative governance mechanisms for environmental justice and indigenous land protection.

name: Global Democracy Coalition Regional Forums 2026
description: Series of four regional forums running from March to June before converging in a Global Forum in fall 2026, taking a new regional approach to democracy strengthening.
relevance_note: Regional approach to democratic coalition-building relevant to multi-level governance and participatory democracy at planetary scale.

name: Democracy Narratives: What works—and what doesn't
description: Launch of new global research on how narratives can strengthen democracy and why this matters now more than ever.
relevance_note: Directly addresses democratic strengthening through narrative strategies, relevant to planetary governance communication and participatory democracy framing.

name: People and Planet: From Theory to Solutions
description: Multisectoral conference exploring solutions for planetary health and regional vitality, addressing synergies and contradictions between biodiversity, health, and economy.
relevance_note: Explicitly addresses planetary health with multi-stakeholder collaboration on integrated solutions for people and planet.

name: EnergyWeek 2026
description: Gathers energy professionals, researchers, policymakers, and business leaders to discuss renewable energy, smart energy, energy storage, digitalisation, and circular economy.
relevance_note: Addresses renewable energy transition and circular economy relevant to regenerative systems and planetary health.

name: Funding the Commons SF
description: Intelligence at the Frontier — 2-day AI conference and festival at Frontier Tower, San Francisco. Part conference, part hackathon, part arts festival. Focus on coordination infrastructure for human flourishing.
relevance_note: Core commons/public goods funding community. Regen Network and ÆRTH previously participated.

name: Nordic Sustainability Arena 2026
description: Gathering of Nordic stakeholders prioritizing climate issues to accelerate sustainability efforts.
relevance_note: Nordic-based sustainability gathering. Potential venue for The Garden to present. Naturskyddsforeningen community overlap.

name: Climate Impacts in a Changing World 2026
description: Conference exploring climate impacts from health, energy, food systems, governance, attribution science, and AI-driven impact data perspectives.
relevance_note: Swedish academic conference bridging climate science and governance. Near Transformative Play Initiative (Uppsala). Garden/Spaceship crossover.

name: Solarplaza Summit Sweden 2026
description: Focuses on Sweden's renewable energy sector, particularly solar PV and energy storage, bringing together grid operators, investors, asset owners, and developers.
relevance_note: Addresses renewable energy transition critical to planetary regeneration and climate action.

name: People Powered 2026 Convening: Nairobi
description: Global gathering on participatory democracy bringing together practitioners and researchers.
relevance_note: Central convening for participatory democracy practitioners, relevant to planetary governance through democratic innovation and global south perspectives.

name: Nets4Dem Democracy Lab 2026
description: Workshop for local and regional government officials looking for new ways to engage young people in democracy.
relevance_note: Youth engagement in democracy critical for intergenerational planetary governance and long-term democratic sustainability.

name: World Governments Summit 2026
description: Global platform for governments, international organizations, thought leaders, and private sector. Theme: "Shaping Future Governments".
relevance_note: High-level government innovation venue. Relevant for governance innovation actors across orientations.

name: Not If, But How: Climate, Movements, and Transformative Change
description: Four-part CLIMA Fund series unpacking the climate crisis and grassroots solutions, grounded in wisdom and leadership of grassroots movements across the Global South.
relevance_note: Directly connects climate crisis to grassroots democratic participation and Global South leadership, essential for planetary regenerative systems.

name: Political Tech Summit 2026
description: Europe's premier event dedicated to the intersection of technology and politics.
relevance_note: Technology's role in democratic governance relevant to digital tools for planetary coordination and participatory systems.

name: 2026 Bath Conference on Earth System Governance
description: The University of Bath hosts the 2026 annual conference of the Earth System Governance Project, bringing together social scientists working on governance and global environmental change.
relevance_note: Core conference on planetary governance research, focusing on earth system governance, sustainability transformations, and global environmental change governance.

name: Global Citizens Assembly 2026
description: Permanent global citizens assembly on transition issues. 2026 Civic Assembly focuses on governance of global food systems and climate change. Goal: 10 million participants by 2030.
relevance_note: Directly implements planetary-scale participatory governance. Core relevance to General Assembly orientation and The Garden's vision.

name: Immersion LARP Festival 2026
description: Nordic LARP immersion festival in Finland. Focus on deep, transformative LARP experiences.
relevance_note: Nordic LARP community event. Eleusinian Mysteries orientation. Complementary to Knutpunkt.

name: Laboratories of Democracy: Global Innovations in School and Youth Participation
description: Explores case studies, best practices, and new resources for engaging children and youth in decisions shaping their present and future.
relevance_note: Youth participation essential for intergenerational planetary governance and democratic education for future decision-makers.

name: Engaging Communities for Effective Climate Solutions
description: Explores how meaningful stakeholder and civil society engagement can make climate projects more effective, equitable, and sustainable, organized with Asian Development Bank.
relevance_note: Community engagement in climate action directly relevant to participatory approaches to planetary regenerative systems and climate governance.

name: World Forum for Democracy 2025: Democracy at Risk
description: Global voices gathering to answer: How can we revive democracy?
relevance_note: Major democracy forum addressing democratic renewal, relevant to planetary governance through democratic innovation and systemic transformation.

name: Rights of Nature Tribunal — 6th International Session
description: 6th international session of the International Rights of Nature Tribunal, held on the eve of COP30. Launched "A New Pledge for Mother Nature" — a closing declaration synthesizing over a decade of testimony and community struggles.
relevance_note: Core event for Global Alliance for the Rights of Nature. Directly relevant to Garden of Eden and General Assembly orientations.

name: UN Climate Change Conference COP30
description: UN Climate Change Conference. The 30th Conference of the Parties, held Nov 10-21 2025 in Belem, Brazil. Major milestone for Paris Agreement implementation and nature-climate nexus.
relevance_note: Central venue for climate governance actors; Rights of Nature Tribunal held parallel session. Multiple tracked actors participated.

name: Democracy R&D Conference 2025
description: Annual conference bringing together global experts exploring how deliberative democracy can drive systemic change. Belgium chosen as birthplace of institutionalized citizens assemblies.
relevance_note: Core network for deliberative democracy innovation. Sortition Foundation and Metagov communities overlap. General Assembly orientation.

name: IUCN World Conservation Congress
description: IUCN Members adopted 144 motions setting conservation policy for the next 20 years. Major themes: nature-climate nexus, rights of nature, Indigenous stewardship.
relevance_note: Landmark conservation governance event. Global Alliance for the Rights of Nature participated. Next edition ~2029.

name: OGP Global Summit
description: Engagement with global leaders to advance open government initiatives.
relevance_note: Open government and transparency essential for participatory planetary governance and democratic accountability.

name: Athens Democracy Forum 2025
description: Global leaders exploring democratic renewal, tech innovation, and visionary governance.
relevance_note: Democratic renewal and tech innovation relevant to planetary governance systems and transformative democratic practices.

name: Different AI Horses for Different Courses: Matching Tools to Purpose
description: Practical framework for matching AI tools to different civic engagement goals, drawing on People Powered's international participatory democracy experience.
relevance_note: AI tools for civic engagement relevant to scaling participatory democracy and planetary coordination through technology.

name: AI for Digital Democracy: New Guidance from Global Case Studies
description: Global speakers presenting case studies on how AI is empowering communities globally.
relevance_note: AI for community empowerment relevant to digital tools for participatory planetary governance and democratic innovation.

name: Rights of Nature Tribunal — Climate Week NYC
description: Tribunal session during Climate Week NYC 2025. Delivered verdict on the Mountain Valley Pipeline, judgment on Mexico's Tren Maya megaproject, and resolution on Yucatan mega pig farms.
relevance_note: Brings rights of nature framework to global climate audience.

name: AI and Governance In Asia: Asia Center 10th International Conference
description: Explores AI's impact on democracy, connecting experts advancing ethical and inclusive AI governance.
relevance_note: Ethical AI governance essential for participatory planetary systems and ensuring democratic control of transformative technologies.

name: Democratic Innovations in Latin America: Social Movements, Indigenous Peoples and Traditional Communities
description: Explores Latin American democratic innovations with global scholars and community leaders, focusing on social movements, Indigenous peoples, and traditional communities.
relevance_note: Indigenous and traditional community governance practices offer crucial insights for planetary regenerative systems and participatory democracy beyond Western models.

name: Caux Democracy Forum 2025
description: Co-creating democratic solutions with global changemakers through dialogue, storytelling, and arts.
relevance_note: Arts-based and storytelling approaches to democracy relevant to transformative experiences and cultural dimensions of planetary governance.

name: Civic Tech In the Age of AI
description: UNDP and People Powered exploring how digital tools, particularly AI and civic tech, can expand civic space, foster democratic resilience, and ensure digital governance serves collective good.
relevance_note: Civic tech and AI for democratic resilience directly relevant to digital infrastructure for participatory planetary governance.

name: 2025 TC/ESG Conference: Navigating Sustainability Transformations Towards Justice and Equity
description: Conference held in Johannesburg focusing on navigating sustainability transformations with emphasis on justice and equity dimensions.
relevance_note: Addresses equity and justice in sustainability transformations, key concerns for planetary governance and regenerative systems in Global South contexts.

name: COP30
description: The 30th Conference of the Parties to the UN Framework Convention on Climate Change, held in the Amazon region of Brazil, with GARN advancing Rights of Nature perspectives.
relevance_note: Major international climate governance forum where Rights of Nature frameworks are being advanced, connecting planetary wellbeing with legal recognition of nature's inherent rights.

name: European DAO Workshop 2025
description: 2nd European DAO Workshop exploring decentralized governance at the intersection of blockchain technology, institutional design, and democratic innovation.
relevance_note: Academic venue for DAO governance research. Relevant to Spaceship Earth actors and Metagov community.

name: GARN's Pre-COP30 Summit
description: Four-day summit celebrating GARN's 15th anniversary with strategic meetings, Indigenous Council strengthening, and the 6th International Rights of Nature Tribunal session before COP30.
relevance_note: Major gathering advancing Rights of Nature governance frameworks, indigenous leadership, and alternative tribunal systems as models for planetary stewardship ahead of global climate negotiations.

name: RadicalxChange 2025 Ukraine
description: RadicalxChange conference bringing together artists, activists, academics, entrepreneurs, and technologists to reimagine social and institutional systems.
relevance_note: Focuses on upgrading democratic and economic systems through mechanisms like quadratic voting, data dignity, and plural governance innovations.

name: Stanford Blockchain Governance Summit 2025
description: Two-day immersive summit at Stanford Law School exploring DAO frameworks, regulatory approaches, AI governance agents, and cross-chain governance mechanisms.
relevance_note: Leading academic venue for blockchain governance research. Relevant to Spaceship Earth actors working on DAOs and digital democracy.

name: Interoperable Deliberative Tools Symposia and in-person offsites
description: Interoperable Deliberative Tools Symposia and in-person offsites (Berkeley, Oct 2024; Jan 2025)

name: Helmut Schmidt Future Prize
description: Helmut Schmidt Future Prize (Awarded to Sanna Marin, May 2023)

name: World Social Forum in Nepal
description: World Social Forum in Nepal (2023)

name: Global Peace Game at the Boston GreenFest's Future Leaders Summit
description: Global Peace Game at the Boston GreenFest's Future Leaders Summit (August 2021, virtual)

name: IUCN Global Youth Summit
description: IUCN Global Youth Summit (2021)

name: 2nd Conference on Earth-Space Sustainability
description: Conference on Earth-Space Sustainability focusing on law, stewardship, and equity, hosted at the University of Leiden.
relevance_note: Expands planetary governance to include outer space, addressing stewardship, equity and legal frameworks for earth-space sustainability.

name: Annual local chapters and national assemblies
description: Annual local chapters and national assemblies

name: COP27
description: COP27

name: Devcon 3
description: Devcon 3 (Cancun, historic)

name: International Rights of Nature Tribunals
description: International Rights of Nature Tribunals (e.g., Lima Tribunal covering the Mirador Mining Project)

name: Mathematics for Governance Design workshop
description: Mathematics for Governance Design workshop (University of Edinburgh)

name: Miljövänliga veckan
description: Miljövänliga veckan ("Eco-friendly Week" initiated in 1990)

name: New Shape Forum
description: New Shape Forum

name: Para Jugar
description: Para Jugar (A Spanish LARP convention for chamber LARPs)

name: Planetary Boundaries Science Lab events / Global summits
description: Planetary Boundaries Science Lab events / Global summits

name: Q&A with the 2026 Bath Team
description: Open Q&A session with the organizing team for the 2026 Bath Conference on Earth System Governance.
relevance_note: Information session for participatory planning of a major planetary governance conference.

name: Regular organizational AGMs
description: Regular organizational AGMs

name: SDG A-Z Guide book presentation and SDG Taskforce meeting
description: Presentation of newly published open-access SDG A-Z Guide and meeting of the Sustainable Development Goals Taskforce.
relevance_note: Focuses on Sustainable Development Goals governance and implementation, critical framework for planetary sustainability.

name: Sustainability Now Podcast, Cacao Conversations Podcast
description: Sustainability Now Podcast, Cacao Conversations Podcast

name: Symposium and Author Workshop on Earth System Law
description: Two-day event bringing together scholars and practitioners to critically assess the development of earth system law.
relevance_note: Addresses legal frameworks for planetary governance, examining how law can support earth system stewardship and sustainability transformations.

name: TEDx Hungary, Scottish Parliament, and Conway Hall
description: Speaking engagements at TEDx Hungary, Scottish Parliament, and Conway Hall

name: UNFCCC COP26
description: UNFCCC COP26

name: Webinar: How is the Global South positioned within the Earth System Governance network?
description: A webinar organized by the ESG Project's South-South Initiative and ESG Research Centre Brasília examining Global South positioning within the earth system governance network.
relevance_note: Addresses equity and representation in global governance networks, examining power dynamics and inclusion in planetary governance research.

name: Ystad Summit
description: Ystad Summit (Panel on Planetary Boundaries)

name: multiple ongoing LARPs across Europe
description: Host multiple ongoing LARPs across Europe (primarily Spain and Italy)

name: Earth System Governance Conference 2026
description: Annual conference of the Earth System Governance Project, themed "Building just and sustainable futures for planetary integrity." Brings together researchers, policymakers, and practitioners working on the governance of Earth system change.
relevance_note: Core gathering for academic and policy community around planetary governance.

name: OIDP 2026 — International Observatory on Participatory Democracy
description: 25th annual OIDP conference under the theme "Hope and renewal in the face of a global crisis of democracy." Addresses polarisation, climate change, migration, and the declining trust in democratic institutions through practitioner exchange across cities and regions.
relevance_note: The central practitioner conference for participatory democracy globally.
